name: Callahan Emporium
content: The Callahan Emporium is about the only building in Callahan, other than the post office. The Emporium consists of a bar and a general store. The general store sells guitar strings but no guitars, and drum sticks but no drums, along with many other useful items. I have not been to the bar but people tell me both the food and the drinks are good. People here are friendly and will watch out for each other.
